items.title: ECB’s Escriva sees energy inflation passing through to other sectors
items.summary: European Central Bank (ECB) policymaker José Luis Escrivá said on Thursday that higher energy costs are spreading to services and transport, while warning that the inflation outlook remains highly uncertain for the Europ

items.summary_ko: 유럽 중앙 은행 (ECB) 정책 입안자 호세 루이스 에스크리바 (José Luis Escrivá) 는 목요일에 높은 에너지 비용이 서비스 및 운송으로 확산되고 있다고 말하면서 인플레이션 전망이 여전히 매우 불확실하다고 경고했다.

items.title: Dow Jones Industrial Average nurses its Warsh hangover
items.summary: Wall Street's blue-chip index spent Thursday picking up the pieces of Wednesday's hawkish Federal Reserve (Fed) selloff, and not even a roaring chip trade could coax it back into the green.
